zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes of Wangen於大約1162年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 奧斯塔利亞內瑟爾望望根時，她的父親Albero I von Wangen und Burgeis27歲，母親Mathilde von Eschenbach18歲。她與Meinhard III. Von Abensberg結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1226年在蘇聯白俄羅斯Нач享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes of Wangen于大约1162年出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 奧斯塔利亞內瑟爾望望根时，她的父亲Albero I von Wangen und Burgeis27岁，母亲Mathilde von Eschenbach18岁。她与Meinhard III. Von Abensberg结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1226年在苏联白俄罗斯Нач享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Wangen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Arlis, Erik, Nels, Obert.
German and possibly also Flemish: variant of German and Dutch   Wang  . This surname is most common in Belgium, especially in its German-speaking part in Wallonia.

variants.name: Vangen
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads named with the definite singular of vang, from Old Norse vangr ‘field’, ‘meadow’. Compare Wangen .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes of Wangen was born about 1162, in Wangen, Nesselwang, Ostallgäu, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Albero I von Wangen und Burgeis, was 27 and her mother, Mathilde von Eschenbach, was 18. She married Meinhard III. Von Abensberg. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1226, in Nach', Belarus, Soviet Union, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes of Wangen est née environ 1162, à Wangen, Nesselwang, Landkreis Ostallgäu, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Albero I von Wangen und Burgeis, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von Eschenbach, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Meinhard III. Von Abensberg. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1226, à Nach', Biélorussie, Union soviétique, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes of Wangen um 1162 in Wangen, Nesselwang, Landkreis Ostallgäu, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Albero I von Wangen und Burgeis 27 und ihre Mutter Mathilde von Eschenbach 18. Sie hat Meinhard III. Von Abensberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1226 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Nach', Weißrussland, Sowjetunion.

Lei sposato Meinhard III. Von Abensberg. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1226, nel Nach', Bielorussia, Sowjetunion, all'età di 65 anni.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes of Wangen родилась около 1162 г. в местности ванген, несселванг, ландкрис осталлгaу, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Albero I von Wangen und Burgeis было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Eschenbach, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Meinhard III. Von Abensberg. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1226 г. в местности Нач, Беларусь, Советский Союз в возрасте 65 лет.
